title: [lichen_l2.c:557] peer_try_all_pubkeys out_len not restored on success
description: When peer_try_all_pubkeys finds a match (found_idx >= 0), it restores ctx->peer_pubkey and ctx->peer_eui64 but does NOT restore *out_len. The saved_out_len is overwritten on each iteration (line 515), but on success the function returns without restoring out_len to what lichen_link_rx() produced for the matched peer. The value in *out_len after the loop corresponds to the LAST peer tried, not the matched peer. Fix: save out_len when found_idx is set and restore it before returning.
close_reason: Fixed: added found_out_len to save output length when match is found, restored before returning
